name: marketplace
description: Action toolkit for planning, diagnosing, improving, and operating search, recommender, and pre-member personalisation systems in two-sided trust marketplaces. Seven user-invokable commands plus a context-extractor meta-skill that captures your specific stack, composed over four research-grounded knowledge libraries spanning feature engineering, retrieval planning, pre-member conversion, and personalisation lifecycle. Canonical stack examples: OpenSearch, AWS Personalize, Twilio Segment, Amplitude, Databricks, Datadog — any compatible alternative works via the MCP connector abstraction.
